title: aurinia saxatilis subsp. arduinii
intro: Aurinia saxatilis subsp. arduinii, also known as the Italian candytuft, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and support immune function. Aurinia saxatilis subsp. arduinii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its flowers can also be used as a natural food coloring and garnish.
